/usr/bin/c++ -g -O2 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mno-omit-leaf-frame-pointer -ffile-prefix-map=/home/devnull69/Projects/CoverFlowMP=. -flto=auto -ffat-lto-objects -fstack-protector-strong -fstack-clash-protection -Wformat -Werror=format-security -fcf-protection -fdebug-prefix-map=/home/devnull69/Projects/CoverFlowMP=/usr/src/coverflowmp-1.0.1 -Wdate-time -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=3 -Wl,-Bsymbolic-functions -flto=auto -ffat-lto-objects -Wl,-z,relro CMakeFiles/CoverFlowMPApp.dir/CoverFlowMPApp_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CoverFlowMPApp.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CoverFlowMPApp.dir/src/app/AppController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CoverFlowMPApp.dir/src/media/VideoLibraryModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CoverFlowMPApp.dir/src/media/LibraryScanner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CoverFlowMPApp.dir/src/media/ThumbnailService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CoverFlowMPApp.dir/src/player/MpvObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CoverFlowMPApp.dir/src/player/PlayerController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CoverFlowMPApp.dir/src/persistence/ResumeRepository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CoverFlowMPApp.dir/CoverFlowMPApp_autogen/EWIEGA46WW/qrc_resources.cpp.o -o CoverFlowMPApp  -Wl,-rpath,::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Quick.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Sql.so.6.4.2 -lmpv /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6QmlModels.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Qml.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2
